blended.narrative: Spirit Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 4,513 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 52°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
